task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Nissan Altima (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $27000.00 and wholesale is $20392.00. Product features: Mid-size sedan with available AWD and ProPILOT Assist. Reference: https://www.nissanusa.com/vehicles/cars/altima.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Nissan Altima. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Nissan Altima. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
